<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\Concerns\PackageServiceProvider; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\View; trait ProcessViewSharedData { protected function bootPackageViewSharedData(): self { if (empty($this->package->sharedViewData)) { return $this; } foreach ($this->package->sharedViewData as $name => $value) { View::share($name, $value); } return $this; } }
